scripts.dev: concurrently -k "vite" "tsup src/main.ts --format esm --out-dir dist-electron --watch" "tsup src/preload.ts --format cjs --out-dir dist-electron --watch" "wait-on tcp:5173 dist-electron/main.js dist-electron/preload.cjs && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron ."
scripts.build: tsup src/main.ts --format esm --out-dir dist-electron && tsup src/preload.ts --format cjs --out-dir dist-electron && vite build
